name: windi-core
description: WINDI sovereign intelligence layer for Claude Code. Provides infrastructure operations, agent management, document governance, and constitutional protocol for the WINDI ecosystem on Strato (87.106.29.233). Includes 8 domain skills, Three Dragons agent profiles, and constitutional hooks.

constitutional.principle: AI processes. Human decides. WINDI guarantees.

skills.name: windi-location-matrix
skills.description: GPS da infraestrutura WINDI — portas, paths, nginx, serviços

skills.name: windi-infra
skills.description: Operações Strato — nginx, systemd, SSL, deploy, smoke test

skills.name: windi-terminal-code
skills.description: Referência CCode CLI — self-knowledge do Gêmeo

skills.name: windi-agent-palette
skills.description: Palette frontend — deploy, temas KLAR/NOIR, tiles, SealBadge

skills.name: windi-memory-loop
skills.description: Inteligência fluídica — osmose, blocos de sabedoria, destilação

skills.name: windi-isp-factory
skills.description: ISP profiles — 19 perfis institucionais, templates Jinja2, SGE

skills.name: windi-clone
skills.description: WINDI Clone instances — nós autônomos, prateleiras P0-P7, fases 1→3

skills.name: windi-sge-analyzer
skills.description: SGE risk detection — 6 camadas semânticas, R0-R5

hooks.description: nginx -t obrigatório antes de qualquer edição em sites-enabled/
